revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Lacking overview}} begin-->{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{<includeonly>subst:</includeonly>NAMESPACE}}|<includeonly>[[Category:Pages with incorrectly substituted templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]</includeonly>|}}{{Ambox | name = Lacking overview | type = style | issue = This {{{1|article}}} '''lacks an overview of its topic.''' | fix = You can help by writing the [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (lists)#Lead paragraphs in embedded lists|lead section]]. | date = {{{date|}}} }}{{DMCA|Articles needing cleanup|from|{{{date|}}}|All pages needing cleanup}}{{DMCA|Articles with sections that need to be turned into prose|from|{{{date|}}}}}<!--{{Prose}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[sn:Lacking overview]] [[Category:Templates]]

{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Lacking overview}} begin-->{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{<includeonly>subst:</includeonly>NAMESPACE}}|<includeonly>[[Category:Pages with incorrectly substituted templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]</includeonly>|}}{{Ambox | name = Lacking overview | type = style | issue = This {{{1|article}}} '''lacks an overview of its topic.''' | fix = You can help by writing the [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (lists)#Lead paragraphs in embedded lists|lead section]]. | date = {{{date|}}} }}{{DMCA|Articles needing cleanup|from|{{{date|}}}|All pages needing cleanup}}{{DMCA|Articles with sections that need to be turned into prose|from|{{{date|}}}}}<!--{{Prose}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTLacking overview]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23508203007|commit triggered pipeline]]
